/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-g++ --sysroot=/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot  -L/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -L/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr_x5/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -Wl,-rpath-link,/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -Wl,-rpath-link,/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr_x5/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -L/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -L/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr_x5/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -Wl,-rpath-link,/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -Wl,-rpath-link,/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr_x5/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu CMakeFiles/serial_port_demo.dir/src/serial_port_demo.cpp.o -o serial_port_demo
